subjects: OSU staff deserve a fair contract
0% COLAs are not acceptable
Respect classified staff at OSU
A fair contract cannot wait
Protect OSU staff rights
We reject 19 years to the top step
Higher education works because staff work
OSU should not balance budgets on workers’ backs
Pay OSU classified staff enough to live on
Protect layoff and contracting-out rights
OSU staff need real raises and real protections
Invest in the people who keep OSU running
A 19-year step path is not progress
Staff deserve respect at the bargaining table
Settle a fair contract for OSU staff
No takeaways in the next OSU contract
Honor the rights workers built
Do not make staff pay for management's budget choices
OSU needs a contract that respects its workers
HELL, NO to 0% COLAs and takeaways
osu-president.body:
President Murthy and Members of the OSU Board of Trustees,

I am writing in support of Oregon State classified staff and our union. I am asking OSU to settle a fair contract that respects the members and coworkers who keep our campuses clean, safe, running, and serving students.

Please reject an offer that provides no cost-of-living increases for four years, would stretch the step system to 19 years from Step 1 to Step 10, and rolls back layoff and contracting-out protections. OSU classified workers deserve a contract that pays enough to live on and protects the rights our union has built over decades.

Sincerely,
[Your name]
[Your OSU role or connection]

higher-ed-strike-pledge.headline: Sign the Higher Ed strike pledge
higher-ed-strike-pledge.summary: Management is still at 0% COLA, with major takeaways still on the table. Signing the pledge shows that Higher Ed workers reject this offer and are ready to keep fighting for a fair contract.
higher-ed-strike-pledge.promoBody: A strong response gives our bargaining team a clear measure of worker readiness and shows management that we are organized across all seven universities.

image.alt: A purple background with silhouettes of raised fists and campus mascots, featuring the Higher Education Bargaining 2026 message.

details.label: What it is
details.value: A way to show our bargaining team and management that workers reject the current offer

details.label: What it is not
details.value: The pledge is not a strike-authorization vote

details.label: What comes next
details.value: Sign once, then ask 10 coworkers to stand with you

actionPage.headline: Sign the Higher Ed strike pledge
actionPage.body: The pledge tells our bargaining team and management that Higher Ed workers reject 0% COLA and the takeaways still on the table. It helps our union measure readiness and decide how strongly workers are prepared to act together.
actionPage.nextStep: This is not a strike-authorization vote. Sign the pledge, then ask 10 coworkers to sign with you.

hell-no-president-email.headline: Take 3 actions with our union for a fair contract
hell-no-president-email.summary: Oregon State University management is stalling. Email OSU leadership today, sign the strike pledge when it arrives and build our union with one coworker conversation.
hell-no-president-email.promoHeadline: One email. One pledge. One conversation.
hell-no-president-email.promoBody: Each action builds our power and shows OSU that classified staff are informed, organized and ready to stand with one another.

image.alt: A purple background with silhouettes of raised fists and campus mascots, featuring the Higher Education Bargaining 2026 message.

details.label: Today
details.value: Email OSU leadership and demand a fair contract

details.label: Next week
details.value: Read and sign our union's strike pledge

details.label: Starting now
details.value: Become a member or ask one coworker to join

ctas.label: Take 3 actions for a fair contract

actionPage.headline: Take 3 actions with our union for a fair contract
actionPage.body: Our collective power comes from members moving together. Email OSU leadership today, sign the strike pledge when it arrives and build our union by becoming a member or asking one coworker to join.
actionPage.nextStep: Start with the email today. The action hub explains every step and will carry the strike pledge link as soon as it is available.

membership-july-16.headline: Membership meeting Thursday, July 16
membership-july-16.summary: We are in a new phase of bargaining. Table details are confidential for now, but our public job is clear: higher ed works because we work, and we need members ready to move together.
membership-july-16.promoHeadline: Higher ed works because we work.
membership-july-16.promoBody: Join us at noon in Memorial Union room 215. Lunch is provided, Zoom details are coming shortly, and we will talk through how members can show OSU and higher ed that our power is disciplined, organized, and visible.

image.alt: A purple background with silhouettes of raised fists and campus mascots, featuring the Higher Education Bargaining 2026 message.

actionPage.headline: Show up for the July 16 membership meeting
actionPage.body: The bargaining team is in confidential negotiations, so the details from the table stay internal for now. What we can do publicly is build member readiness: attend the meeting, bring a coworker, join the CAT, and be ready to show OSU that higher ed workers are organized.
actionPage.nextStep: After the membership meeting, the CAT meets Monday evening, July 20, to coordinate coworker outreach and next steps.

cat-july-20.headline: CAT meeting Monday evening, July 20
cat-july-20.summary: Join the Contract Action Team meeting to coordinate coworker outreach and keep our worksites moving together.
cat-july-20.promoHeadline: Help carry the update back to your worksite.
cat-july-20.promoBody: The CAT meeting is where members turn updates into coworker conversations and visible action. Time and Zoom details are coming shortly.

image.alt: SEIU Local 503 at Oregon State University card graphic.

actionPage.headline: Help carry the update back to your worksite
actionPage.body: CAT members share updates, listen to coworkers, and help turn member readiness into visible workplace power.
actionPage.nextStep: Invite one coworker who wants to help but has not joined CAT yet.

fallback.headline: Check the latest Local 083 updates
fallback.summary: We are updating the current action page. Visit the events calendar for the latest meeting information.
fallback.promoHeadline: Find the next meeting or action.
fallback.promoBody: When a new action is ready, this page will point you to it.
